notes: Journal helpers (getJournalPath/writeJournal/markJournalCompleted/cleanupJournal/backupFile) are module-private to consolidate.ts -- their write-time shape is observed via spyOn(fs.writeFileSync/copyFileSync) interception around a REAL akmConsolidate run (src/-change-free technique, same as WI-04's goldens-mv-txn.test.ts).

journalPhasesObserved encoding (brief §3.2 rule 4): only the write COUNT and each write's parsed shape are recorded as informational data -- never asserted against raw journal bytes or directory layout.

fullRunLifecycle.firstJournalWrite/lastJournalWrite.operations[].ref embeds a fixture-local ref (tests/fixtures/goldens/consolidate/fixture-refs.ts) -- re-baseline @ 5 caveat on that field only; the asset as a whole stays frozen-migration-input (same convention as the WI-03/04 fileTree-key caveats).
scenario: consolidate journal round-trip: full-run lifecycle + all-hot chunk early-exit (WI-06, R5)
